comment: Strict islands phase 2: expanded to shared, sdui-types, and mcp packages (all at 0 TS errors). ESLint strict-any zones expanded per audit rec #1 to cover agent-fabric, middleware, and runtime.
migration_note: Expand strict_zones one package at a time after each zone reaches zero TS errors under its strict-zone tsconfig. ESLint strict-any zones are expanded independently -- see eslint.config.js strictNoAnyOverrides.
